steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate y
steps.content:
The $y$ coefficients are $3y$ and $-3y$ — they're opposites. Adding the equations eliminates $y$:
$$3y + (-3y) = (4x + 17) + (9x - 23)$$
$$0 = 13x - 6$$
$$13x = 6$$

steps.title: Calculate 39x directly
steps.content:
Since the problem asks for $39x$ and $39 = 3 \times 13$:
$$39x = 3 \times (13x) = 3 \times 6 = 18$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
